skills.name: PostKing
skills.description: Generate, schedule, and publish social posts, blogs, SEO articles, and landing pages via PostKing. Drives the full surface through the pking CLI.

skills.name: SEO End-to-End
skills.description: Run SEO from seed keywords to published articles using PostKing. Covers the full pipeline — seeds, expansion, clustering, roadmap, drafting, gap analysis, publish.

skills.name: Content Week Planner
skills.description: Plan, generate, and approve a full week of social posts across all connected platforms in one go.

skills.name: Repurpose URL to Social
skills.description: Turn any URL, blog post, or long text into platform-tailored, voice-matched social posts, then schedule them.

skills.name: Blog Publish Pipeline
skills.description: Generate a blog article, iterate with AI edits, and publish it to PostKing or to external platforms (WordPress, Medium, Substack).

skills.name: Landing Page Builder
skills.description: Generate a landing page, iterate with AI edits, optionally connect a custom domain, and publish it live.

skills.name: Onboarding
skills.description: First-time PostKing setup — register or log in, onboard a brand from a website URL, connect social accounts, and generate your first post.
